import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update invoice fields"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/invoices/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update invoice fields (customerEmail, customerName, reference, redirectUrl, webhookUrl, expiredAt).

Use `POST :id/activate` for payment configuration and activation.
Use `POST :id/cancel` for cancellation.

**Allowed statuses**: PREPARED, ACTIVE

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
